# GitHub Repository Topics

Copy-paste these into **Settings → Topics** on the GitHub repo page.
They make the repo discoverable via GitHub Search and topic pages.

```
ai-agent
typescript
llm
multi-agent
rag
mcp
openai
anthropic
gemini
groq
ollama
langchain-alternative
crewai-alternative
guardrails
circuit-breaker
human-in-the-loop
observability
opentelemetry
vector-store
embeddings
workflow
dag
durable-execution
budget-enforcement
agent-framework
production-ai
open-source
```

> GitHub allows up to 20 topics. Pick the most relevant 20 if you hit the limit.
